case_title: TZU-TIEN HUANG VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUN-02-2010 IN DEPT. 206, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT OF CASE TO A SINGLE JUDGE CONTINUED FROM JUN-02-2010 TO MASTER CALENDAR MOTION AT JUN-29-2010, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. DEFENDANT'S MOTION IS PROVISIONALLY GRANTED ON THE CONDITION THAT ALL CASES ARISE FROM THIS INCIDENT ARE ON FILE. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ALL DISCOVERY IS STAYED THROUGH AND INCLUDING 6/29/10. MOVING PARTY TO GIVE NOTICE OF THIS ORDER TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-29-2010 IN 206, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT OF CASE TO A SINGLE JUDGE HELD. THE COURT SINGLY ASSIGNED ALL PRE-TRIAL MATTERS IN THIS CASE TO DEPT. 206. A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET FOR 9/22/10 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERED DISCOVERY STAYS LIFTED AS OF 6/29/10 AS TO ANY PENDING DISCOVERY. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT AN ORDER TO THE COURT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
